# .github/requirements.txt
#
# Python tooling dependencies for CI workflows.
# Pinned here so Dependabot can track and propose version updates.
#
# Used by:
#   - .github/workflows/esphome_build.yml (code_scan job)
#   - .github/workflows/validate_blueprint.yml
#   - .github/workflows/validate_yamllint.yml
#   - .github/workflows/validate_python.yml (flake8)
#
# Note: ESPHome itself is intentionally absent — its version is resolved
# dynamically by the workflow (latest/dev tracks) and must not be pinned.

flake8==7.3.0
yamllint==1.38.0
